records.probability_basis: Draft Oakland Table 17-1 lists Probability as 1.2; Table 17-2 defines index value 4 as Highly Likely, mapped by StayReady to High.
records.impact_basis: Draft Oakland Table 17-1 lists Impact as .60; Table 17-2 defines index value 2 as Limited, mapped by StayReady to Medium.
records.official_lhmp_priority_basis: Draft Oakland Table 17-1 lists earthquake PRI Risk Ranking as High.
records.source_document: Draft Oakland 2026-2031 Local Hazard Mitigation Plan
limitations: Draft source; not an adopted-plan production label without visible disclosure.

records.probability_basis: Draft Oakland Table 17-1 lists Probability as .90; Table 17-2 defines index value 3 as Likely, mapped by StayReady to High.
records.impact_basis: Draft Oakland Table 17-1 lists Impact as .60; Table 17-2 defines index value 2 as Limited, mapped by StayReady to Medium.
records.official_lhmp_priority_basis: Draft Oakland Table 17-1 lists wildfire PRI Risk Ranking as High after QAF.
records.source_document: Draft Oakland 2026-2031 Local Hazard Mitigation Plan
limitations: Draft source; wildfire official PRI includes a qualitative adjustment factor not used in StayReady's simplified matrix.

records.probability_basis: Draft Oakland Table 17-1 lists Probability as 1.2; Table 17-2 defines index value 4 as Highly Likely, mapped by StayReady to High.
records.impact_basis: Draft Oakland Table 17-1 lists Impact as .60; Table 17-2 defines index value 2 as Limited, mapped by StayReady to Medium.
records.official_lhmp_priority_basis: Draft Oakland Table 17-1 lists flood PRI Risk Ranking as Medium after considering all PRI factors.
records.source_document: Draft Oakland 2026-2031 Local Hazard Mitigation Plan
limitations: StayReady's simplified Probability/Impact priority differs from the official PRI ranking because the official PRI uses additional factors.

records.probability_basis: Draft Oakland Table 17-1 lists Probability as .60; Table 17-2 defines index value 2 as Possible, mapped by StayReady to Medium.

records.probability_basis: Draft Oakland Table 17-1 lists Tsunami/Seiche Probability as .60; Table 17-2 defines index value 2 as Possible, mapped by StayReady to Medium.

limitations: Address-level tsunami status must come from an official tsunami hazard-area intersection.
